title: [ExportVerilog] Emit zero param as "0" not "64'd0"
skipped_reason: no SV content - this PR fixes a tool emission format issue in CIRCT's ExportVerilog, not a SystemVerilog construct that triggers a bug. The issue shows FIRRTL input that gets compiled to Verilog output, with the 'bug' being that zero parameters are emitted as "64'd0" instead of "0". This is valid Verilog - the fix is about canonical output format, not correcting invalid SV syntax.
